title: Plantaginorchis finetiana
taxonomy: Plantaginorchis finetiana is classified as a species of terrestrial orchid. It is part of the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, it is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. Furthermore, it belongs to the tribe Orchideae and is a member of the genus Plantaginorchis. The species has not been extensively studied, but it is often found in Africa.
